chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2053 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application(s) 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For orders on stay application 5. For hearing of main case 27.11.2025 Mr. Sher Dil Ansari, advocate for petitioner (s) *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that NBWs have been issued against the petitioner by the learned VIIIth Additional District Judge Hyderabad/Executing Court for execution of decree passed in Summary Suit No.44 of 2022. Counsel submits that petitioner is ready and willing to appear before the learned Executing Court, provided that operation of NBWs issued against him may be set aside. In view of the above the operation of NBWs issued by the learned Executing Court in Execution Application No.35 of 2022, arising out of Summary Suit No.44 of 2022 against the petitioner is suspended for a period of two weeks from today, however, subject to furnishing a Personal Bond equivalent to decreetal amount in terms Decree dated 15.08.2022 passed in above Summary Suit before Additional Registrar of this Court. In case petitioner fails to appear before the Executing Court within two weeks, the Executing Court is empowered to act in accordance with law without making any reference to this Court. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
